info.name: SAP BI Tools SAP Analytics Cloud API

description.content:
RESTful API for SAP Analytics Cloud enabling programmatic access to system data stored on an SAP Analytics Cloud tenant. The API provides endpoints for managing stories, models, users, teams, calendars, and other resources. It supports SCIM 2.0 for user provisioning, OData for data access, and standard REST patterns for content management. Authentication uses OAuth 2.0 with SAML bearer assertion or authorization code grant flows.

Contact Support:
 Name: SAP Support
